title: stachys germanica var. ehrenbergii
intro: Stachys germanica var. ehrenbergii, also known as German betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to Europe. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, and has been found to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. German betony can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal preparations to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
